retry_reason: Failure is due to sysfs or parameter errors (e.g., missing parent kobject), which are not transient; retrying without fixing the underlying issue will not succeed.
contract_summary: Set wrapper that initializes and adds a sysfs kobject for a btrfs qgroup, establishing the initial reference count (via kobject_init_and_add). The function returns 0 on success and a negative error code on failure; on failure it calls kobject_put to clean up the partially initialized kobject. The caller must not call this function again if qgroup->kobj.state_initialized is already set. After successful creation, the caller must eventually call kobject_put to release the initial reference (typically during qgroup cleanup). The function is guarded by a check for testing mode and requires a valid parent kobject (qgroups_kobj).
